data.title: Therap Timesheet Module: Simplifying Staff Hours and Activity Management
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Torrington, Connecticut, Therap Services announced their position as the top provider of HIPAA-compliant electronic documentation solutions for industries such as Long-Term Services and Supports (LTSS) and Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS). The company is recognized nationally for their expertise in serving organizations within the human services sector.

data.title: Syska Hennessy Promotes Four to Associate Partner In Four Different Cities
data.description: In a recent announcement made on April 23, 2026, Syska Hennessy Group, a renowned international engineering firm, has elevated four employees to the role of associate partner. These promotions are distributed across four distinct offices located in the United States. Among the staff members who have been promoted is Brandon Henson, who holds designations as a Professional Engineer (PE) and Certified Plumbing Designer (CPD).

data.title: Cox Interior Appoints Former nobilia Head Mikael Åkerberg as CEO.
data.description: In Campbellsville, Kentucky on April 23, 2026, Cox Interior revealed Mikael Åkerberg as their new Chief Executive Officer. Åkerberg's main objectives will be to propel the company's growth by increasing market presence, forming key alliances, and fostering advancements in various areas.

data.title: Covalent Launches "Covalent Connect," Unlocking Seamless Access to the World's Most Advanced Materials Characterization Capabilities
data.description: A cutting-edge platform has been introduced by Covalent, a distinguished provider of advanced materials analysis services. This platform aims to speed up the process of addressing intricate product issues by incorporating the worldwide metrology infrastructure and knowledge. The announcement was made on April 23, 2026, in Sunnyvale, California. This innovative solution will facilitate quicker resolutions to challenges faced in product development.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig's Environmental, Real Estate Practices Shortlisted for Chambers Awards 2026
data.description: On April 23, 2026, Greenberg Traurig, LLP, a leading global law firm, has been nominated by Chambers for the prestigious 2026 Environment Law Firm of the Year and Real Estate Law Firm of the Year awards. The finalists include the firm's Environmental and Real Estate practices. The announcement of the winners will take place at a ceremony soon.

data.title: DTE Energy intends to pause future electric rate requests following upcoming filing as data centers come online
data.description: DTE Energy's electric company, NYSE: DTE, is set to capitalize on the affordability advantages brought by data centers to counterbalance reliability investments for all customers. The company, based in Detroit, disclosed plans to abstain from seeking rate hikes for a minimum of two years.

data.title: Saint Anthony Hospital Adds Expert Ear, Nose, Throat Doctor
data.description: Renowned surgeon, Dr. Dara Adams, will be offering surgical services at the Physician Center of Saint Anthony Hospital in Chicago. This expansion of services by the non-profit hospital, committed to providing top-notch healthcare to marginalized areas, includes specialized treatment for ear, nose, and throat conditions. The addition of Dr. Adams to the team is set to significantly enhance the hospital's capacity to cater to a broader range of patients in need. The appointment is effective starting April 23, 2026.

data.title: Thumbtack Delivers Home Services Experience in Anthropic’s Claude
data.description: In San Francisco, Thumbtack revealed its recent partnership with Anthropic’s AI assistant, Claude, enabling users on Free, Pro, and Max plans to seamlessly access Thumbtack's home services marketplace. Through this integration, individuals in the U.S. now have the ability to transition from seeking home-related advice to discovering, evaluating, and engaging with highly-rated local professionals directly via the Claude interface. This collaboration streamlines the process for users to inquire about various home services like maintenance, repairs, and upgrades, further enhancing the overall customer experience.

data.title: StubHub Brings Live Event Discovery to Anthropic’s Claude
data.description: In New York, StubHub unveiled a partnership that allows users to explore and peruse live events through Claude, Anthropic's AI assistant. This integration aims to provide fans with seamless access to various events and enhance their browsing experience with AI technology.

data.title: LiveWire Group, Inc. To Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 5, 2026
data.description: LiveWire Group, Inc. (NYSE: LVWR) will unveil its Q1 financial results on May 5, 2026, before the market opens in Milwaukee. Interested parties can tune into Harley-Davidson, Inc.’s audio webcast lasting from 8-9:30 a.m. CT. The session will focus solely on LiveWire's financial performance and any revised outlook. Attendees are advised to log in and register at least 10 minutes before the event. Access the slide presentation at https://investor.li.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Mark New Highs; These Truck Stocks Clear Entries (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today in stock market news, the Dow Jones index closed Thursday's volatile trading session with gains. The Nasdaq and S&P 500 also reached new highs. Additionally, some truck stocks showed promising signs by clearing entry points. The overall market performance shows positive momentum, with the Dow Jones rising by [number], Nasdaq hitting an all-time high, and S&P 500 also marking a new record. Investors are closely monitoring these developments as they indicate a bullish trend in the market.

data.title: Lyra Therapeutics, Inc. Announces Intention to Voluntarily File Form 25 for Delisting from Nasdaq and Subsequent Deregistration with the SEC
data.description: Lyra Therapeutics, based in Watertown, Mass., has decided to voluntarily submit a Form 25 Notification of Delisting to the SEC on April 20, 2026, in order to remove its common stock from the Nasdaq Stock Market. The trading of the Company's common stock was halted by Nasdaq on March 17, 2026, and even though Nasdaq plans to submit its own Form 25 later, it has not yet done so. Thus, the Company is taking this step independently to proceed with deregistration. Currently, the Company's common stock is listed on the Pink Limited Market. This action adheres to Rule 12d2-2(c) under the Exchange Act.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Spike With U.S. Set To Blockade Iran's Ports; Goldman Sachs Beats Views
data.description: US futures are down and oil prices have surged as the US Navy is preparing to blockade Iranian ports at 10 a.m. ET on Monday following unsuccessful talks with Iran. Ahead of the market opening, Goldman Sachs has exceeded expectations. The Dow Jones futures are in decline, coinciding with the rise in oil prices, as the US prepares to take action against Iran.

data.title: Kailera Therapeutics Announces Pricing of Initial Public Offering
data.description: Kailera Therapeutics, Inc. (traded on Nasdaq under the symbol KLRA) disclosed today the pricing details of its initial public offering.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Closes Higher Ahead Of Peace Talks; Palantir Plunges (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones experienced a decline amidst mixed trading activities. Notably, the chipmaker Nvidia saw significant growth as TSMC surged due to robust sales. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq closed higher ahead of peace talks, showing positive momentum in the market. However, Palantir faced a plunge in its stock value. These updates on the market were covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Janet Yellen Keeps Fed Cut Hopes Alive As Iran War Roils Markets— 'If I Had To Write One Thing Down...'
data.description: Former U.S. Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen expressed the possibility of a Federal Reserve rate cut later this year amidst the Iran conflict causing an oil-driven inflation shock. Speaking at the HSBC Global Investment Summit in Hong Kong, Yellen mentioned that despite rising near-term inflation expectations, the Fed remains open-minded. Yellen highlighted the broad supply shock affecting various sectors like gasoline, LNG, fertilizers, food, and shipping costs due to the over six-week Iran conflict. She stated that if she had to speculate, there might be a rate cut later in the year. The full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
